visa_types.name: Visiting Family and Friends
visa_types.documents_required:
Short Term Visa Checklist Cyprus
The following documents should be presented in order to support your visa application.

- Affidavit form parents (for children under the age of 18)
- Flight itinerary (2 way)
- Proof of accommodation – Hotel reservations, rental of holiday home- If the applicant intends to stay with a family member or a friend, proof of sponsorship and/or private accommodation from the host.
- Original Bank statement of the last three months with Stamp and signed.
- Photocopy of Tax Declaration for the last three years
- Letter from the employer / letter of explanation from the applicant
- Invitation letter in case of business trip
- Invitation letter from host in case of visit to family and friends
- Bank Guarantee from the host stamped by the Migration Department
- Assumption of Responsibility from the host notarized
- Medical travel insurance (coverage of at least €30.000), valid for the entire duration of stay in Cyprus.
- Assumption of responsibility to host form. The form must be completed by the host and certified by a notary public.
- Copy of the Bank guarantee letter from the host valid for the period of ten year and stamped by the Migration Department in Nicosia. Bank guarantee letters are issued for the amount of:
- Under age children (below 18), that intend to enter Cyprus unaccompanied, should present a statement signed by both parents and stamped by the mayor of their area. If children are accompanied by one parent only, the authorization of the other parent is required.
- Approved TMI companies list
visa_types.visa_fees:
[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]
VFS service charge
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 2]
Please Note:
- The applicable fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate provided by Cyprus mission. It is subject to change without notice.
- Please note that applicants from Nepal will be charged a mandatory two-way international courier fee of NPR 3,736, which will be collected at the visa application center during the application process.
- Additionally, visa fees are to be paid via Demand Draft in favor of "Cyprus High Commission". For convenience, a bank counter is available at the VFS office to assist applicants in preparing the demand draft, with an additional service charge of NPR 1,375.
VFS service charge - Maldives
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST@8%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 3]
To add value to our customer, we offer some value added services. You will need to pay an extra fee in addition to the visa application fee when you avail these value added services. To know about these services please refer the additional service page of this website.
- Note:  Visa fee and service charges are not refunded if your application is refused by the Embassy of Cyprus, or if you withdraw you application while it is under processing at the Embassy of Cyprus, New Delhi.
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing at the Embassy of Cyprus normally takes 10-15 working days, but may in some cases take longer.
Note:
- Applications accepted at the Cyprus visa application Centre at Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Chandigarh, Chennai, Cochin, Goa, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Jalandhar, Kolkata, Mumbai, Puducherry and Pune will be submitted on third working day to The High Commission of the Republic of Cyprus in New Delhi.
- Applications accepted at the Cyprus visa application Centre at Bangkok, Colombo, Hanoi & Ho Chi Minh City, Kathmandu, Kuala-Lumpur and Male will be submitted on fourth or fifth working day to The High Commission of the Republic of Cyprus in New Delhi.
visa_types.forms:
Application for Visa
Assumption of Responsibility for Hosting
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Cyprus for visiting family and friends purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Cyprus for visiting family and friends purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]
VFS service charge
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 2]
Please Note:
- The applicable fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate provided by Cyprus mission. It is subject to change without notice.
- Please note that applicants from Nepal will be charged a mandatory two-way international courier fee of NPR 3,736, which will be collected at the visa application center during the application process.
- Additionally, visa fees are to be paid via Demand Draft in favor of "Cyprus High Commission". For convenience, a bank counter is available at the VFS office to assist applicants in preparing the demand draft, with an additional service charge of NPR 1,375.
VFS service charge - Maldives
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST@8%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 3]
To add value to our customer, we offer some value added services. You will need to pay an extra fee in addition to the visa application fee when you avail these value added services. To know about these services please refer the additional service page of this website.
- Note:  Visa fee and service charges are not refunded if your application is refused by the Embassy of Cyprus, or if you withdraw you application while it is under processing at the Embassy of Cyprus, New Delhi.

## Documents Required
Short Term Visa Checklist Cyprus
The following documents should be presented in order to support your visa application.

- Affidavit form parents (for children under the age of 18)
- Flight itinerary (2 way)
- Proof of accommodation – Hotel reservations, rental of holiday home- If the applicant intends to stay with a family member or a friend, proof of sponsorship and/or private accommodation from the host.
- Original Bank statement of the last three months with Stamp and signed.
- Photocopy of Tax Declaration for the last three years
- Letter from the employer / letter of explanation from the applicant
- Invitation letter in case of business trip
- Invitation letter from host in case of visit to family and friends
- Bank Guarantee from the host stamped by the Migration Department
- Assumption of Responsibility from the host notarized
- Medical travel insurance (coverage of at least €30.000), valid for the entire duration of stay in Cyprus.
- Assumption of responsibility to host form. The form must be completed by the host and certified by a notary public.
- Copy of the Bank guarantee letter from the host valid for the period of ten year and stamped by the Migration Department in Nicosia. Bank guarantee letters are issued for the amount of:
- Under age children (below 18), that intend to enter Cyprus unaccompanied, should present a statement signed by both parents and stamped by the mayor of their area. If children are accompanied by one parent only, the authorization of the other parent is required.
- Approved TMI companies list

## Photo Specifications
2 passport-sized photos, signed on the back, not older than 6 months (35mm x 45mm) in color, with the face covering 70-80% of the height of the photo and without glasses.:
- color photo.
- showing full face
- taken without headgear.
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face.
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.

## Processing Time
The processing at the Embassy of Cyprus normally takes 10-15 working days, but may in some cases take longer.
Note:
- Applications accepted at the Cyprus visa application Centre at Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Chandigarh, Chennai, Cochin, Goa, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Jalandhar, Kolkata, Mumbai, Puducherry and Pune will be submitted on third working day to The High Commission of the Republic of Cyprus in New Delhi.
- Applications accepted at the Cyprus visa application Centre at Bangkok, Colombo, Hanoi & Ho Chi Minh City, Kathmandu, Kuala-Lumpur and Male will be submitted on fourth or fifth working day to The High Commission of the Republic of Cyprus in New Delhi.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
Assumption of Responsibility for Hosting

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the
form
link
- When the form opens, save the form on your
computer.
OR
- Press the right button on
your mouse
on the required link.
- Select
Save Target As
from the list
- Save
the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Tourist
visa_types.documents_required:
Short Term Visa Checklist Cyprus
The following documents should be presented in order to support your visa application.
- Application form completed and signed by the applicant. If the applicant is a minor, the visa application must be signed by both parents/legal guardians.
- Cover latter.
- Employment letter
- 2 passport size photos signed at the back, Not older than 6 months (35mm x 45mm) in color with white background with no software corrections.
- Original passport + photocopy of passport + Old Passports (If any)
- Affidavit form parents (for children under the age of 18)
- Flight itinerary (2 way)
- Proof of accommodation – Hotel reservations, rental of holiday home- If the applicant intends to stay with a family member or a friend, proof of sponsorship and/or private accommodation from the host.
- Original Bank statement of the last three months with Stamp and signed.
- Photocopy of Tax Declaration for the last three years
- Letter from the employer / letter of explanation from the applicant
- Invitation letter in case of business trip
- Invitation letter from host in case of visit to family and friends
- Bank Guarantee from the host stamped by the Migration Department
- Assumption of Responsibility from the host notarized.
- Medical travel insurance (coverage of at least €30.000), valid for the entire duration of stay in Cyprus.
Under age children (below 18), that intend to enter Cyprus unaccompanied, should present a statement signed by both parents and stamped by the mayor of their area. If children are accompanied by one parent only, the authorization of the other parent is required.
If applicant has a valid, multiple entries Schengen visa on his/her passport, he/she can enter Cyprus without a visa.

Approved TMI companies list

Note: Visa fee and service charges are not refunded if your application is refused by the Embassy of Cyprus, or if you withdraw you application while it is under processing at the Embassy of Cyprus, New Delhi.

Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Cyprus for Tourist purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Cyprus for Tourist purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]
VFS service charge
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 2]
Please Note:
- The applicable fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate provided by Cyprus mission. It is subject to change without notice.
- Please note that applicants from Nepal will be charged a mandatory two-way international courier fee of NPR 3,736, which will be collected at the visa application center during the application process.
- Additionally, visa fees are to be paid via Demand Draft in favor of "Cyprus High Commission". For convenience, a bank counter is available at the VFS office to assist applicants in preparing the demand draft, with an additional service charge of NPR 1,375.
VFS service charge - Maldives
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST@8%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 3]
To add value to our customer, we offer some value-added services. You will need to pay an extra fee in addition to the visa application fee when you avail these value-added services. To know about these services please refer the additional service page of this website.

Note: Visa fee and service charges are not refunded if your application is refused by the Embassy of Cyprus, or if you withdraw you application while it is under processing at the Embassy of Cyprus, New Delhi.

## Documents Required
Short Term Visa Checklist Cyprus
The following documents should be presented in order to support your visa application.
- Application form completed and signed by the applicant. If the applicant is a minor, the visa application must be signed by both parents/legal guardians.
- Cover latter.
- Employment letter
- 2 passport size photos signed at the back, Not older than 6 months (35mm x 45mm) in color with white background with no software corrections.
- Original passport + photocopy of passport + Old Passports (If any)
- Affidavit form parents (for children under the age of 18)
- Flight itinerary (2 way)
- Proof of accommodation – Hotel reservations, rental of holiday home- If the applicant intends to stay with a family member or a friend, proof of sponsorship and/or private accommodation from the host.
- Original Bank statement of the last three months with Stamp and signed.
- Photocopy of Tax Declaration for the last three years
- Letter from the employer / letter of explanation from the applicant
- Invitation letter in case of business trip
- Invitation letter from host in case of visit to family and friends
- Bank Guarantee from the host stamped by the Migration Department
- Assumption of Responsibility from the host notarized.
- Medical travel insurance (coverage of at least €30.000), valid for the entire duration of stay in Cyprus.
Under age children (below 18), that intend to enter Cyprus unaccompanied, should present a statement signed by both parents and stamped by the mayor of their area. If children are accompanied by one parent only, the authorization of the other parent is required.
If applicant has a valid, multiple entries Schengen visa on his/her passport, he/she can enter Cyprus without a visa.

Approved TMI companies list

## Photo Specifications
Two [2] photographs of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:
- color photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.

## Processing Time
The processing at the Embassy of Cyprus normally takes 10-15 working days but may in some cases take longer.
Note
- Applications accepted at the Cyprus visa application Centre at Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Chandigarh, Chennai, Cochin, Goa, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Jalandhar, Kolkata, Mumbai, Puducherry and Pune will be submitted on third working day to The High Commission of the Republic of Cyprus in New Delhi.
- Applications accepted at the Cyprus visa application Centre at Bangkok, Colombo, Hanoi & Ho Chi Minh City, Kathmandu, Kuala-Lumpur and Male will be submitted on fourth or fifth working day to The High Commission of the Republic of Cyprus in New Delhi.

visa_types.name: Airport Transit
visa_types.documents_required:
Short Term Visa Checklist Cyprus
The following documents should be presented in order to support your visa application.
- 2 passport photos + photos of children when included on parents’ passport.
- Original passport + photocopy of passport + Old Passports (If any)
- Air ticket and visa for onward destination country
- Bank Statement of last three (3) months
- Photocopy of Tax Declaration for the last three years
- Under age children (below 18), that intend to enter Cyprus unaccompanied, should present a statement signed by both parents and stamped by the mayor of their area. If children
                                                                                are accompanied by one parent only, the authorization of the other parent is required.
If applicant has a valid, double and/or multiple entries Schengen visa on his/her passport, he/she can enter Cyprus without a visa.
Domestic staff (housekeepers, nannies, drivers etc) that accompanies their employer should present a valid residence and work permit to India.
Nationals from the countries listed in the table below (as well as persons who are not nationals of those countries, but who possess travel documents issued by the authorities of
                                                                            those countries) are required to possess this type of visa.
List of countries whose nationals are subject to the airport visa (ATV) requirement 

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Airport Transit > Documents Required 1]
Citizens of the aforementioned countries are exempt from the Airport Transit Visa (ATV) requirement if they are holders of residence permits of either: a member state of the EU or
                                                                            the EEA , Andorra, Monaco, Canada, Japan, San Marino and the United States of America.
DOCUMENTATION FOR VISA ISSUANCE 
- Application form completed and signed
- 2 passport size photos signed at the back
- Passport photocopy
- Affidavit form parents (for children under the age of 18)
- Flight itinerary (2 way)
- Hotel reservation
- Original Bank statement of the last three months
- Photocopy of Tax Declaration for the last three years
- Letter from the employer / letter of explanation from the applicant
- Invitation letter in case of business trip
- Invitation letter from host in case of visit to family and friends
- Bank Guarantee from the host stamped by the Migration Department
- Assumption of Responsibility from the host notarized
- Medical travel insurance (coverage of at least €30.000), valid for the entire duration of  stay in Cyprus
- Approved TMI companies list

visa_types.forms:
Application for Visa
Assumption of Responsibility for Hosting
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa entitles aliens who are required to have such a visa to pass through the international transit area of Cypriot airports without actually entering the national territory of Cyprus, during a stop-over or transfer between two stages of an international flight. The requirement to have this visa is an exception to the general right to transit without a visa through Cyprus.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa entitles aliens who are required to have such a visa to pass through the international transit area of Cypriot airports without actually entering the national territory of Cyprus, during a stop-over or transfer between two stages of an international flight. The requirement to have this visa is an exception to the general right to transit without a visa through Cyprus.

## Visa Fees

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]
VFS service charge
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 2]
Please Note:
- The applicable fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate provided by Cyprus mission. It is subject to change without notice.
- Please note that applicants from Nepal will be charged a mandatory two-way international courier fee of NPR 3,736, which will be collected at the visa application center during the application process.
- Additionally, visa fees are to be paid via Demand Draft in favor of "Cyprus High Commission". For convenience, a bank counter is available at the VFS office to assist applicants in preparing the demand draft, with an additional service charge of NPR 1,375.
VFS service charge - Maldives
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST@8%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 3]
To add value to our customer, we offer some value added services. You will need to pay an extra fee in addition to the visa application fee when you avail these value added services. To know about these services please refer the additional service page of this website.
- Note:  Visa fee and service charges are not refunded if your application is refused by the Embassy of Cyprus, or if you withdraw you application while it is under processing at the Embassy of Cyprus, New Delhi.

## Documents Required
Short Term Visa Checklist Cyprus
The following documents should be presented in order to support your visa application.
- 2 passport photos + photos of children when included on parents’ passport.
- Original passport + photocopy of passport + Old Passports (If any)
- Air ticket and visa for onward destination country
- Bank Statement of last three (3) months
- Photocopy of Tax Declaration for the last three years
- Under age children (below 18), that intend to enter Cyprus unaccompanied, should present a statement signed by both parents and stamped by the mayor of their area. If children
                                                                                are accompanied by one parent only, the authorization of the other parent is required.
If applicant has a valid, double and/or multiple entries Schengen visa on his/her passport, he/she can enter Cyprus without a visa.
Domestic staff (housekeepers, nannies, drivers etc) that accompanies their employer should present a valid residence and work permit to India.
Nationals from the countries listed in the table below (as well as persons who are not nationals of those countries, but who possess travel documents issued by the authorities of
                                                                            those countries) are required to possess this type of visa.
List of countries whose nationals are subject to the airport visa (ATV) requirement 

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Airport Transit > Documents Required 1]
Citizens of the aforementioned countries are exempt from the Airport Transit Visa (ATV) requirement if they are holders of residence permits of either: a member state of the EU or
                                                                            the EEA , Andorra, Monaco, Canada, Japan, San Marino and the United States of America.
DOCUMENTATION FOR VISA ISSUANCE 
- Application form completed and signed
- 2 passport size photos signed at the back
- Passport photocopy
- Affidavit form parents (for children under the age of 18)
- Flight itinerary (2 way)
- Hotel reservation
- Original Bank statement of the last three months
- Photocopy of Tax Declaration for the last three years
- Letter from the employer / letter of explanation from the applicant
- Invitation letter in case of business trip
- Invitation letter from host in case of visit to family and friends
- Bank Guarantee from the host stamped by the Migration Department
- Assumption of Responsibility from the host notarized
- Medical travel insurance (coverage of at least €30.000), valid for the entire duration of  stay in Cyprus
- Approved TMI companies list

## Photo Specifications
Two [2] photographs of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:
- color photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.

## Processing Time
The processing at the Embassy of Cyprus normally takes 10 -15 days, but may in some cases take longer.

visa_types.name: Long Stay Visa
visa_types.overview:
The procedure for granting Long term permits is governed by the Foreign and Migration Law and by decisions of the Council of Ministers and of the Parliamentary Committee responsible for matters
                                                                pertaining to foreigners. 
For further details kindly refer to www.mfa.gov.cy (http://www.mfa.gov.cy)
Important information:
The Republic of Cyprus being a member of the Hague Convention of 1961, requires Apostille from the Ministry of External Affairs, Govt. of India for all Educational/Personal/Commercial document/s
                                                                for all long term visa. 
VFS Global is authorized to accept the applications for Apostille on behalf of Ministry of External Affairs, Govt. of India. For further information on VFS Global attestation services you may
                                                                visit our website http://www.vfsattestation.com (http://www.vfsattestation.com) or call our Attestation helpline 022-67866027 (Timings – 9:30
                                                                to 13:00 and 14:00 to 17:00) except holidays.
visa_types.full_text:
The procedure for granting Long term permits is governed by the Foreign and Migration Law and by decisions of the Council of Ministers and of the Parliamentary Committee responsible for matters
                                                                pertaining to foreigners. 
For further details kindly refer to www.mfa.gov.cy (http://www.mfa.gov.cy)
Important information:
The Republic of Cyprus being a member of the Hague Convention of 1961, requires Apostille from the Ministry of External Affairs, Govt. of India for all Educational/Personal/Commercial document/s
                                                                for all long term visa. 
VFS Global is authorized to accept the applications for Apostille on behalf of Ministry of External Affairs, Govt. of India. For further information on VFS Global attestation services you may
                                                                visit our website http://www.vfsattestation.com (http://www.vfsattestation.com) or call our Attestation helpline 022-67866027 (Timings – 9:30
                                                                to 13:00 and 14:00 to 17:00) except holidays.

In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST@8%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 3]
To add value to our customer, we offer some value added services. You will need to pay an extra fee in addition to the visa application fee when you avail these value added services. To know about these services please refer the additional service page of this website.
- Note:  Visa fee and service charges are not refunded if your application is refused by the Embassy of Cyprus, or if you withdraw you application while it is under processing at the Embassy of Cyprus, New Delhi.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Cyprus for medical treatments. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Cyprus for medical treatments. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]
VFS service charge
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 2]
Please Note:
- The applicable fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate provided by Cyprus mission. It is subject to change without notice.
- Please note that applicants from Nepal will be charged a mandatory two-way international courier fee of NPR 3,736, which will be collected at the visa application center during the application process.
- Additionally, visa fees are to be paid via Demand Draft in favor of "Cyprus High Commission". For convenience, a bank counter is available at the VFS office to assist applicants in preparing the demand draft, with an additional service charge of NPR 1,375.
VFS service charge - Maldives
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST@8%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 3]
To add value to our customer, we offer some value added services. You will need to pay an extra fee in addition to the visa application fee when you avail these value added services. To know about these services please refer the additional service page of this website.
- Note:  Visa fee and service charges are not refunded if your application is refused by the Embassy of Cyprus, or if you withdraw you application while it is under processing at the Embassy of Cyprus, New Delhi.

## Documents Required
Short Term Visa Checklist Cyprus
The following documents should be presented in order to support your visa application.
- Application form completed and signed by the applicant. If the applicant is a minor, the visa application must be signed by both parents/legal guardians.
- Cover latter.
- Employment letter
- 2 passport-sized photos, signed on the back, not older than 6 months (35mm x 45mm) in color, with the face covering 70-80% of the height of the photo and without glasses.
- Original passport + photocopy of passport + Old Passports (If any)
- Affidavit form parents (for children under the age of 18)
- Flight itinerary (2 way)
- Proof of accommodation – Hotel reservations, rental of holiday home- If the applicant intends to stay with a family member or a friend, proof of sponsorship and/or private accommodation from the host.
- 2 passport photos
- Original Bank statement of the last three months with Stamp and signed.
- Photocopy of Tax Declaration for the last three years
- Letter from the employer / letter of explanation from the applicant
- Invitation letter in case of business trip
- Invitation letter from host in case of visit to family and friends
- Bank Guarantee from the host stamped by the Migration Department
- Assumption of Responsibility from the host notarized
- Medical travel insurance (coverage of at least €30.000), valid for the entire duration of  stay in Cyprus
- Assumption of responsibility to host form. The form must be completed by the host and certified by a notary public.
- If applicant has a valid, multiple entries Schengen visa on his/her passport, he/she can enter Cyprus without a visa.
- Approved TMI companies list

## Photo Specifications
Two [2] photographs of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:
- color photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.

## Processing Time
The processing at the Embassy of Cyprus normally takes 10-15 working days, but may in some cases take longer.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
Assumption of Responsibility for Hosting

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the
form
link
- When the form opens, save the form on your
computer.
OR
- Press the right button on
your mouse
on the required link.
- Select
Save Target As
from the list
- Save
the form on your computer.

visa_types.processing_time:
The processing at the Embassy of Cyprus normally takes 10-15 working days, but may in some cases take longer.
Note
- Applications accepted at the Cyprus visa application Centre at Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Chandigarh, Chennai, Cochin, Goa, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Jalandhar, Kolkata, Mumbai, Puducherry and Pune will be submitted on third working day to The High Commission of the Republic of Cyprus in New Delhi.

- Applications accepted at the Cyprus visa application Centre at Bangkok, Colombo, Hanoi & Ho Chi Minh City, Kathmandu, Kuala-Lumpur and Male will be submitted on fourth or fifth working day to The High Commission of the Republic of Cyprus in New Delhi.

## Photo Specifications
Two [2] photographs of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:

Note
- Applications accepted at the Cyprus visa application Centre at Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Chandigarh, Chennai, Cochin, Goa, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Jalandhar, Kolkata, Mumbai, Puducherry and Pune will be submitted on third working day to The High Commission of the Republic of Cyprus in New Delhi.
- Applications accepted at the Cyprus visa application Centre at Bangkok, Colombo, Hanoi & Ho Chi Minh City, Kathmandu, Kuala-Lumpur and Male will be submitted on fourth or fifth working day to The High Commission of the Republic of Cyprus in New Delhi.

visa_types.name: Participation in cultural or sporting events
visa_types.documents_required:
Short Term Visa Checklist Cyprus
The following documents should be presented in order to support your visa application.
- Application form completed and signed by the applicant. If the applicant is a minor, the visa application must be signed by both parents/legal guardians.
- Cover letter.
- Employment letter
- 2 passport-sized photos, signed on the back, not older than 6 months (35mm x 45mm) in color, with the face covering 70-80% of the height of the photo and without glasses.
- Original passport + photocopy of passport + Old Passports (If any)
- Affidavit form parents (for children under the age of 18)
- Flight itinerary (2 way)
- Proof of accommodation – Hotel reservations, rental of holiday home- If the applicant intends to stay with a family member or a friend, proof of sponsorship and/or private accommodation from the host.
- 2 passport photos
- Original Bank statement of the last three months with Stamp and signed.
- Photocopy of Tax Declaration for the last three years
- Letter from the employer / letter of explanation from the applicant
- Invitation letter in case of business trip
- Invitation letter from host in case of visit to family and friends
- Bank Guarantee from the host stamped by the Migration Department
- Assumption of Responsibility from the host notarized
- Medical travel insurance (coverage of at least €30.000), valid for the entire duration of stay in Cyprus
- Assumption of responsibility to host form. The form must be completed by the host and certified by a notary public.
- If applicant has a valid, multiple entries Schengen visa on his/her passport, he/she can enter Cyprus without a visa.
- Approved TMI companies list
visa_types.visa_fees:
[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]
VFS service charge
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 2]
Please Note:
- The applicable fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate provided by Cyprus mission. It is subject to change without notice.
- Please note that applicants from Nepal will be charged a mandatory two-way international courier fee of NPR 3,736, which will be collected at the visa application center during the application process.
- Additionally, visa fees are to be paid via Demand Draft in favor of "Cyprus High Commission". For convenience, a bank counter is available at the VFS office to assist applicants in preparing the demand draft, with an additional service charge of NPR 1,375.
VFS service charge - Maldives
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST@8%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 3]
To add value to our customer, we offer some value added services. You will need to pay an extra fee in addition to the visa application fee when you avail these value added services. To know about these services please refer the additional service page of this website.
- Note:  Visa fee and service charges are not refunded if your application is refused by the Embassy of Cyprus, or if you withdraw you application while it is under processing at the Embassy of Cyprus, New Delhi.

The processing at the Embassy of Cyprus normally takes 10-15 working days but may in some cases take longer.
Note
- Applications accepted at the Cyprus visa application Centre at Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Chandigarh, Chennai, Cochin, Goa, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Jalandhar, Kolkata, Mumbai, Puducherry and Pune will be submitted on third working day to The High Commission of the Republic of Cyprus in New Delhi.
- Applications accepted at the Cyprus visa application Centre at Bangkok, Colombo, Hanoi & Ho Chi Minh City, Kathmandu, Kuala-Lumpur and Male will be submitted on fourth or fifth working day to The High Commission of the Republic of Cyprus in New Delhi.

Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Cyprus for participation in cultural or sporting events purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Cyprus for participation in cultural or sporting events purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under
                                                                        this category.

## Visa Fees

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]
VFS service charge
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 2]
Please Note:
- The applicable fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate provided by Cyprus mission. It is subject to change without notice.
- Please note that applicants from Nepal will be charged a mandatory two-way international courier fee of NPR 3,736, which will be collected at the visa application center during the application process.
- Additionally, visa fees are to be paid via Demand Draft in favor of "Cyprus High Commission". For convenience, a bank counter is available at the VFS office to assist applicants in preparing the demand draft, with an additional service charge of NPR 1,375.
VFS service charge - Maldives
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Service Charge inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST@8%

[cyp > ind > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 3]
To add value to our customer, we offer some value added services. You will need to pay an extra fee in addition to the visa application fee when you avail these value added services. To know about these services please refer the additional service page of this website.
- Note:  Visa fee and service charges are not refunded if your application is refused by the Embassy of Cyprus, or if you withdraw you application while it is under processing at the Embassy of Cyprus, New Delhi.

## Documents Required
Short Term Visa Checklist Cyprus
The following documents should be presented in order to support your visa application.
- Application form completed and signed by the applicant. If the applicant is a minor, the visa application must be signed by both parents/legal guardians.
- Cover letter.
- Employment letter
- 2 passport-sized photos, signed on the back, not older than 6 months (35mm x 45mm) in color, with the face covering 70-80% of the height of the photo and without glasses.
- Original passport + photocopy of passport + Old Passports (If any)
- Affidavit form parents (for children under the age of 18)
- Flight itinerary (2 way)
- Proof of accommodation – Hotel reservations, rental of holiday home- If the applicant intends to stay with a family member or a friend, proof of sponsorship and/or private accommodation from the host.
- 2 passport photos
- Original Bank statement of the last three months with Stamp and signed.
- Photocopy of Tax Declaration for the last three years
- Letter from the employer / letter of explanation from the applicant
- Invitation letter in case of business trip
- Invitation letter from host in case of visit to family and friends
- Bank Guarantee from the host stamped by the Migration Department
- Assumption of Responsibility from the host notarized
- Medical travel insurance (coverage of at least €30.000), valid for the entire duration of stay in Cyprus
- Assumption of responsibility to host form. The form must be completed by the host and certified by a notary public.
- If applicant has a valid, multiple entries Schengen visa on his/her passport, he/she can enter Cyprus without a visa.
- Approved TMI companies list

## Photo Specifications
Two [2] photographs of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:
- color photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.

## Processing Time
The processing at the Embassy of Cyprus normally takes 10-15 working days but may in some cases take longer.
Note
- Applications accepted at the Cyprus visa application Centre at Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Chandigarh, Chennai, Cochin, Goa, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Jalandhar, Kolkata, Mumbai, Puducherry and Pune will be submitted on third working day to The High Commission of the Republic of Cyprus in New Delhi.
- Applications accepted at the Cyprus visa application Centre at Bangkok, Colombo, Hanoi & Ho Chi Minh City, Kathmandu, Kuala-Lumpur and Male will be submitted on fourth or fifth working day to The High Commission of the Republic of Cyprus in New Delhi.
